evidence: "I LOVED this show...the new season, the first scenes, delegating people between vax and not."
"I am a huge history buff, and thought I could stomach Clooneys narration..."
"Some of it was hard to follow, had to rewind sometimes."
"It was so hard to follow along. Never sure if Jo was thinking about and acting out scenes from the past, or are they present."
"I could feel my anxiety level grow every minute as I watched this."
"It started out great, but there are way too many America Bashing comments, that have nothing to do with the story."
"Great acting...Great Story. Way better than some of the others nominated..."
"Well made, very little dialogue, but the visuals are enough."
"I love Falco, and was happy to see her back."
"I was in tears many times, and thinking of all the babies that suffered, its heart wrenching."
"I could feel my anxiety level grow every minute as I watched this."
"Thank you to the people who made this movie. I was in tears many times..."
"It was so hard to watch the self harm and mental anguish."

summary: The user shows a strong aversion to political themes in media, often expressing frustration with political commentary overshadowing storytelling. They appreciate high production quality and emotional depth, indicating a preference for complex narratives that evoke strong feelings, despite sometimes finding them hard to follow.
